ShortDescription.SourceString:
<text color="FFFFFFFF" fontface="black" size="20" Case="AllCaps">Start a digital revolution and take on Breakpoint's quests to earn up to 1,000 V-Bucks!</>
This pack contains:
ShortDescription.LocalizedString:
<text color="FFFFFFFF" fontface="black" size="20" Case="AllCaps">Start a digital revolution and take on Breakpoint's quests to earn up to 1,000 V-Bucks!</>
This pack contains:

DisclaimerText.SourceString: V-Bucks are in-game currency that can be spent in Fortnite Battle Royale, Creative, and Save the World modes. In Battle Royale and Creative you can purchase new customization items like New Outfits, Gliders, Pickaxes, Emotes, and Wraps! In Save the World, you can purchase X-Ray Llamas that contain weapon and trap schematics, plus new Heroes, and more!
DisclaimerText.LocalizedString: V-Bucks are in-game currency that can be spent in Fortnite Battle Royale, Creative, and Save the World modes. In Battle Royale and Creative you can purchase new customization items like New Outfits, Gliders, Pickaxes, Emotes, and Wraps! In Save the World, you can purchase X-Ray Llamas that contain weapon and trap schematics, plus new Heroes, and more!

Name.SourceString: <text color="FFFFFFFF">Breakpoint's Quests:</> Unlock up to 1,000 V-Bucks as you complete quests!
Name.LocalizedString: <text color="FFFFFFFF">Breakpoint's Quests:</> Unlock up to 1,000 V-Bucks as you complete quests!
